# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Follow the canonical project guidance in `AGENTS.md`.

## Scope

These instructions apply to this repository and are intentionally minimal to prevent drift.
When in doubt, prefer `AGENTS.md` over assumptions.

## Project Snapshot

- Next.js (App Router)
- Material UI (MUI)
- TypeScript

## Rule

Before generating substantial code changes, read and follow `AGENTS.md`.
